name: multi-model-agents
description: AI Agent Swarm Lite 1.5.6-lite.1 adds engineering templates, official evidence gates, progress ledgers, and blocked reports.

interface.shortDescription: AI Agent Swarm Lite 1.5.6-lite.1: engineering templates, official evidence gates, ledgers, and Opus review scoring.
interface.longDescription: AI Agent Swarm Lite 1.5.6-lite.1 is the simplified branch of AI Agent Swarm. Codex keeps planning, authorization, real file changes, real command execution, local project memory, and final decisions. Opus/Claude acts as an external reviewer/scorer for plan-review, diff-review, test-review, and final-review through the opus-reviewer Custom Agent calling multi_model_reviewer_score or multi_model_reviewer_findings. The Gemini tester workflow is intentionally removed. This release aligns Lite with the main v1.5.6 engineering workflow by adding engineering design and development plan templates, an official documentation evidence gate, Progress Ledger, Blocked Report, and stronger documentation self-tests while preserving Lite's shorter Codex-led workflow.
defaultPrompt: Use AI Agent Swarm Lite for this task: Codex remains the orchestrator and final decision maker; Opus/Claude may be used for engineering gate review and scoring.
